projectDescription: Open-source tenant-aware control, metering, and audit layer for AWS Bedrock AI and RAG applications.
keyFeatures: Tenant-aware runtime policy enforcement (allow, deny, filter, quota block)
Per-tenant usage, token tracking, and estimated cost
Quota thresholds with warning states and blocking
Audit-grade request-level ledger for retrieval and generation events
No proxy gateway required — SDK and middleware integration
Admin control plane console for tenant overview and audit inspection
Support for both RetrieveAndGenerate and Retrieve + Converse Bedrock modes
publicApiSurface: Audit ledger query and export API
SDK integration (Mode A: RetrieveAndGenerate, Mode B: Retrieve + Converse)
